Footer.tagline: Aparthotel in Boulogne-Billancourt. A few nights or several months.
Footer.rights: Boulogne Résidence Hôtel. All rights reserved.

Home.heroTitle: An aparthotel in Boulogne. For work, for Paris.
Home.heroSubtitle: 22 rooms and studios, 5 minutes from Marcel Sembat metro. For a night, a week or several months.
Home.whyTitle: Three things to know before you book.
Home.why1Title: Stay as long as you need.
Home.why1Body: One night for Roland-Garros, three for a client trip, two months for a long assignment. Studios with a fully equipped kitchenette to cook whenever you like, classic rooms for short stays. Lower rates from 3 nights.
Home.why2Title: All of Paris within reach. And the Bois on your doorstep.
Home.why2Body: Marcel Sembat metro (line 9) is 400 metres away — a 5-minute walk. The Eiffel Tower in 15 minutes by metro, the Champs-Élysées in 20. The Bois de Boulogne starts at the corner. You pay Boulogne, you live Paris.
Home.why3Title: The stadium, the arena, the festival. Always on foot.
Home.why3Body: Roland-Garros 1.7 km away. Parc des Princes 1.2 km. La Seine Musicale 1.4 km. Longchamp racecourse 3 km. Walk home after the concert, the match, the final — no overpriced ride-hailing, no last metro missed.
Home.who1Body: Your clients are in Boulogne, Issy, La Défense or the 16th. You arrive Monday evening, leave Thursday morning. A studio with a desk, Wi-Fi that holds a video call, a kitchenette so you don't eat out every night. French- and English-speaking reception, monthly business invoicing, 24/7 access.
Home.who2Body: You're coming from Lyon, Bordeaux, Brussels. You want to see Paris without paying central-Paris prices. Direct line 9 to Châtelet in 25 minutes, the Bois de Boulogne round the corner for the Sunday run, a kitchenette for the kids' breakfast. Restaurants and a market 3 minutes away — the living Boulogne, not the postcard one.
Home.who3Title: For the tournament, the match, the concert.
Home.who3Body: Roland-Garros, a PSG final, a concert at La Seine Musicale, races at Longchamp, the Foire de Paris, a show at Porte de Versailles. Everything is on foot or 10 minutes away. Leave the car parked, forget the packed transport home. Walk back after the whistle.
Home.roomsIntro: Five room types on the lower floors, three studios with an equipped kitchenette higher up. All air-conditioned, with a safe, a desk and free Wi-Fi.
Home.room4Pitch: Two separate beds, for colleagues or friends.
Home.direct1Body: No platform commission passed on. The public price, booked direct.
Home.direct2Body: Change your dates up to 24 h before arrival on flexible rates — your terms, not a platform's.
Home.direct3Title: A real person on the line.
Home.direct3Body: +33 1 49 10 05 45 — for groups, long stays and questions a form can't handle.
